mapper.select: SELECT user_id , user_nm AS userNm , email , nickname , profile_img_url , use_yn , reg_dt , upd_dt , last_login_dt FROM tbl_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT user_id , user_nm AS userNm , email , password , nickname , profile_img_url , use_yn , reg_dt , upd_dt , last_login_dt FROM tbl_user WHERE email = #{email} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_user SET last_login_dt = NOW() , upd_dt = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
